blended.narrative: Hudson Bay Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,689 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
